problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: AI-Powered Schema Translation Middleware for Seamless Government System Interoperability
summary: Design a layer using AI-Powered Schema Translation Middleware for seamless government system interoperability.
key_steps: Understands its schema using semantic similarity
Automatically maps fields to the target system schema
Transforms and forwards the data in real time
optimization_claims: AI-based schema mapping using semantic similarity
Reusable mapping memory for faster future integrations
constraints_addressed: Different data formats and schemas between government department systems and the Single Window System
